finding: A Chinese closeout prompt with an explicit task id (`繼續收 ATM-GOV-0196`) was not recognized as task-scoped closeout guidance. `next --prompt` routed to generic `guide`, and `start --goal` then recommended `create-atom` instead of task closeout, even though `next --prompt "close task ATM-GOV-0196"` correctly resolved the same task.
expectedBehavior: Prompts containing an explicit existing task id plus closeout verbs such as 收、收單、結案、關閉, or close should route to the same task-scoped normal playbook as `close task <id>`, not to create-atom guidance.
evidenceOrRepro: 2026-07-20 dogfood while closing ATM-GOV-0196: `node atm.mjs next --prompt "繼續收 ATM-GOV-0196；如果有卡住的 bug 就先回寫 backlog，並且用泛用方法修正排除" --json` returned `ATM_NEXT_PROMPT_GUIDANCE_REQUIRED`; `node atm.mjs start --cwd . --goal "繼續收 ATM-GOV-0196；如果有卡住的 bug 就先回寫 backlog，並且用泛用方法修正排除" --json` recommended `create-atom`; control command `node atm.mjs next --prompt "close task ATM-GOV-0196" --json` returned `ATM_NEXT_TASK_ROUTE_READY` for ATM-GOV-0196.
followUp: Add a generalized first-layer intent rule/test: explicit task ids plus multilingual closeout verbs must enter task-scoped next/playbook routing. Do not hard-code ATM-GOV-0196; derive the existing task id from the ledger and classify the verb set through data-driven lexicon/config.
